name: Macaroni or Spaghetti Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Serves 3
1. Break the macaroni or spaghetti into half-inch lengths.
2. Add a pinch of salt to the milk when boiling and simmer until tender.
3. Stir in the sugar, butter, lemon-rind, and well-beaten yolks of the eggs.
4. Continue stirring over low heat for a few minutes without boiling.
5. Fold in the stiffly-whisked whites of the eggs.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased pie dish.
7. Bake slowly at 25 to 30 degrees Celsius (about 1-1/2 hours) until set.
Time: About 1-1/2 hours. Sufficient for 3 to 4 persons.
